excerpt.rendered: Why the Amiga had multiple display modes coexisting. And how we faked it on the web.

content.rendered:
The Amiga's intuition.library let multiple screens with independent display modes coexist — different resolutions, colour depths, even refresh rates — and you could pull one down with the mouse to reveal another behind it.

On the web we have one rectangle. We fake it with a CSS transform on the front-screen container and a freeform drag handler on the title bar.
